title: Create RoleChatAgent class and type definitions
description: Scaffold `src/backend/ai/agents/chat/index.ts` containing the `RoleChatAgent` class that extends `AIChatAgent`. Ensure it has access to DB, roles, and AI bindings.

title: Migrate streamText and Tools
description: Copy the `streamText` configuration from `chat.ts` into the `onChatMessage` method of `RoleChatAgent`. Translate the 5 `tool()` definitions directly into the new agent's `tools` object. Use `options.body` or `this.env` where appropriate for role context.

title: Register DO in wrangler.jsonc and worker entrypoint
description: Add `ROLE_CHAT_AGENT` to `durable_objects.bindings` and `new_sqlite_classes` in a new migration v6 inside `wrangler.jsonc`. Export it in `src/_worker.ts`.

title: Update Frontend Chat Provider
description: Update `src/frontend/components/assistant-ui/RoleChatProvider.tsx` to use `useAgentChat({ agent: "RoleChatAgent", name: roleId })` from `agents/react`, replacing `useChatRuntime`.

title: Remove Legacy REST Chat Route
description: Delete `src/backend/api/routes/chat.ts` and remove its reference from `src/backend/api/index.ts`. Ensure no build errors remain.
